description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult female pedestrian with a naturalistic body shape and proportions. She has shoulder-length, wavy hair and is dressed in a short-sleeved, fitted top and high-cut underwear, with no visible accessories or outerwear. Her arms are extended horizontally to the sides, forming a T-pose, and her feet are bare. The figure's facial features are stylized but recognizable, and her posture is upright and balanced. The skin surface appears smooth, and the clothing fits closely to the body, emphasizing the contours of the torso and limbs. The overall appearance suggests a casual, everyday urban pedestrian suitable for a variety of street or park environments.
description: A stylized adult female pedestrian in a T-pose, wearing a fitted short-sleeve top and underwear, with shoulder-length wavy hair and bare feet.
description_view_0: Front view showing facial features, chest, and the full front of the torso and legs, with arms extended horizontally.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, chest, and the side contour of the body and limbs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, torso, and legs, with arms outstretched and the back of the clothing visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, chest, and the side contour of the body and limbs.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeve fitted top and high-cut underwear
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally (T-pose)
